creator: eric@madrid.lol
text:
Here you go, this works, less the make install clean, using your PHP port for 11.2.

No SSL for 12 or 13 with your PHP port.

Tried make install clean on 12 / 13 shows in phpinfo() fails in production.

Thank you for your help, love a good challenge! Wish i was not so new at this.

Cheers, Eric!
